raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023, my son and I arrived in XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX. We went to XXXX XXXX XXXX office and rented an automatic vehicle for our stay in XXXX XXXX since we were going to be visiting different cities throughout the country. 
I am a XXXX XXXX XXXX so there could not be a misunderstanding in regard to the final price for the car rental. I was initially told the total price was going to be {$300.00} and extra expenses if the car was damaged in any way. For which I returned the vehicle in perfect condition and was accepted the employees. Soon after coming back to the XXXX, I noticed I was being charged for a total amount of {$800.00} plus another transaction of {$150.00}. I disputed the transaction with Citi bank and they requested more information which I provided. After weeks of waiting for their response, they declined my claim. I called them to get more information from them and I was told there was nothing else I could do from their customer service. I decided to stop the claim and let it go. I was recently told by a friend of mine about CFPB and decided to file this claim to be treated fairly.
